pages.title: Troubleshooting Multi-PreFab Systems
pages.text: $(bold)Problem$(): "One PreFab works, others don't"$(br2)$(bold)Debug steps$(): $(li)Test each PreFab individually $(li)Disconnect chained PreFabs (test in isolation) $(li)Check for resource conflicts (multiple PreFabs pulling same chest)$(br2)$(bold)Problem$(): "Chained PreFabs get out of sync"$(br2)$(bold)Cause$(): PreFab A produces faster than PreFab B consumes$(br2)$(bold)Solution$(): $(li)Use larger intermediate chests $(li)Balance rates (adjust machine counts) $(li)Add buffer storage

pages.title: Monitoring Tools
pages.text: $(bold)F3 Debug Screen$(): $(li)Check chunk loading (C: value) $(li)Verify PreFabs are in CACHED$(br2)$(bold)Chat Messages$() (current): $(li)Watch for state transition messages $(li)"Entering HALTED" → Investigate that PreFab$(br2)$(bold)GUI Inspection$(): $(li)Open each PreFab GUI $(li)Check current state (BUILDING/SIMULATING/CACHED/HALTED)$(br2)---
